pass_summary: Multi-language TDD guard support is well-implemented across tdd.ts, tdd-guard.ts, tdd-tracker.ts, and sentinal.ts. All 5 languages (Go, Python, Rust, C, C++) have correct patterns, test coverage, and consumer wiring. One spec-compliance issue: file-checker skips file-length checks for non-TS code files despite the plan requiring it. One minor gap: tdd-tracker.test.ts lacks multi-language getImplPathForTest tests (plan Task 2 DoD), though equivalent coverage exists in tdd.test.ts.

issues.title: file-checker skips file-length check for non-TS code files
issues.description: In src/hooks/file-checker.ts, `checkFileLength()` is only called inside the `if (isTs)` block (line 25). Non-TS code files (.go, .py, .rs, .c, .cpp) pass through companion test checks but never get file-length warnings. The plan (Task 3 notes, item 4) says: 'Non-TS files only get the file-length check and companion test check.' The file-length check should run for all code files, not just TS.

issues.title: tdd-tracker.test.ts not updated with multi-language getImplPathForTest tests
issues.description: Plan Task 2 lists src/hooks/tdd-tracker.test.ts as a file to modify and the DoD says 'getImplPathForTest() maps test→impl for all languages'. The tracker test file (lines 66-75) still only has TS/JS cases. While comprehensive multi-language coverage exists in src/utils/tdd.test.ts (where the function now lives), the plan explicitly called for tracker test updates.
issues.suggested_fix: Either add multi-language cases to src/hooks/tdd-tracker.test.ts (testing via the re-export) or accept that coverage in tdd.test.ts is sufficient since getImplPathForTest was moved there.

truths.truth: isTestFile('auth_test.go') returns true; isTestFile('auth.go') returns false
truths.evidence: Tests in tdd.test.ts lines 193-202 explicitly verify both assertions. Pattern `/_test\.go$/` in TEST_FILE_PATTERNS handles this.
Test at tdd.test.ts line 64: `getExpectedTestPaths('/src/auth/auth.go')` asserts `['/src/auth/auth_test.go']`. Switch case for '.go' returns `[${base}_test${ext}]`.

truths.truth: getExpectedTestPaths('auth.py') returns paths including both test_auth.py and auth_test.py
truths.evidence: Test at tdd.test.ts lines 74-77: asserts both `/src/auth/test_auth.py` and `/src/auth/auth_test.py` are returned. Switch case for '.py' returns `[join(dir, test_${name}${ext}), ${base}_test${ext}]`.

truths.truth: The TDD guard blocks edits to auth.go when IDLE (with active spec), allows when RED_CONFIRMED
truths.evidence: Tests in tdd-guard.test.ts lines 277-292: 'blocks Go impl files when IDLE' and 'allows Go impl files when RED_CONFIRMED' both pass. Guard uses isGuardedFile() which includes .go.

isTestFile test at tdd.test.ts line 209. getImplPathForTest test at tdd.test.ts line 163: `getImplPathForTest('src/auth/test_auth.py')` returns `'src/auth/auth.py'`. Prefix regex `/(^|[/\\])test_[^/\\]+\.py$/` and prefix match in getImplPathForTest handle this.

truths.truth: All existing TS/JS/TSX/JSX tests remain green
truths.evidence: Existing TS/JS tests are preserved and expanded (not removed) in tdd.test.ts. The diff shows test cases were reformatted but assertions are unchanged. tdd-guard.test.ts existing tests preserved. tdd-tracker.test.ts existing getImplPathForTest tests unchanged at lines 66-75.
